# Smart Hotline - Call Center & AI Voice Agents for SMBs

## About
Smart Hotline is a call center agency based in Montreal, Quebec, providing professional phone answering services and AI voice agents for SMBs.

## Services
- Inbound Call Reception (24/7)
- Outbound Calling & Lead Generation
- AI Voice Agents (Sophie - answers in 2 seconds)
- Customer Support (phone, email, chat, WhatsApp)
- CRM Integration & B2B/B2C Lists

## Key Stats
- 500+ SMB clients
- 98% satisfaction rate
- 24/7 availability
- 48-hour setup
- Bilingual French-English

## Contact
- Phone: +1 514 819-0559
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/15148190559
- Email: direction@smart-hotline.com
- Location: Montreal, Quebec, Canada

## Pricing
- Trial: 2 weeks free
- Hourly rates: $15-19 CAD
- AI agents: per-minute pricing
